meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to Finish SaaS Projects
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your SaaS builds. Learn how to leverage Claude Code and Antigravity to automate development and ship your MVP faster than ever before.
content.answer_block: You are stuck because your development friction exceeds your shipping velocity. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your CLI into a high-leverage engineering partner. This setup automates boilerplate, enforces architectural standards, and executes complex refactoring, allowing you to move from ideation to deployment without getting bogged down in syntax.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is paved with 'almost finished' features and abandoned repositories. As a founder, your greatest enemy isn't a lack of ideas—it’s the crushing weight of technical debt and the cognitive load of manual coding. You are burning precious runway wrestling with implementation details when you should be obsessing over product-market fit.

But the paradigm has shifted. By mastering Claude Code and Antigravity, you stop being a programmer and start being an architect. We are going to strip away the development friction that keeps your product in perpetual beta, turning your terminal into a high-throughput engine that builds as fast as you can think.

steps.title: Initialize the Intelligent Workspace
steps.description: Configure your environment to be context-aware. This ensures Claude Code understands your project structure immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the existing directory structure and create a project_manifest.md that outlines the core business logic, API endpoints, and critical dependencies for a high-performance SaaS MVP.

steps.title: Automate Feature Scaffolding
steps.description: Don't write boilerplate. Use Antigravity to define the pattern, then execute via Claude Code to generate production-ready code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a modular, scalable controller pattern for a new feature endpoint that includes error handling, input validation, and logging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Implement the controller pattern defined in the prompt to the users/auth route."

steps.title: Enforce Architectural Standards
steps.description: Prevent tech debt by having the AI act as a senior code reviewer for every commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Establish a strict coding standard for this repository that prioritizes clean architecture, dependency injection, and performance efficiency.

steps.title: Optimize Database Schemas
steps.description: Use AI to analyze your data needs and generate optimized SQL or Prisma migrations automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current feature requirements and propose a normalized database schema that minimizes query latency and supports future scaling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Execute migration creation for the proposed schema and verify against existing models."

steps.title: Automated Testing Pipeline
steps.description: Shift testing left by having the AI write unit tests for every feature before you merge.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive test suite for the newly created service layer, focusing on edge cases and security vulnerabilities.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Create and execute tests for the new service layer. Fail if coverage is below 90%."

pro_tips: Always feed your 'System Prompt' into Claude Code to maintain brand voice and architectural consistency across different files.
Use Antigravity to generate 'Decision Logs' for every major feature; this acts as a brain for Claude when you revisit the code months later.
Run Claude Code in 'batch mode' for repetitive refactoring tasks to save tokens and maintain a consistent style across the entire codebase.
Never accept the first code output; use the 'refine' command in Claude Code to specifically ask for 'Performance-First' or 'Memory-Optimized' iterations.
Treat your repository as a living API; use Claude Code to auto-update your documentation files whenever you modify a controller or service function.
content.next_steps: Once your environment is set up, focus on shipping your first 'Micro-Feature' in under 60 minutes to validate your new velocity.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting incomplete projects drain your potential. Leverage these tools to regain your momentum, focus on revenue, and ship your MVP before your competitors even finish their wireframes. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
